title: ligularia formosana
intro: Ligularia formosana, also known as Formosa ligularia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to Taiwan, characterized by its large, yellow flowers and tall, upright growth habit. The medicinal properties of Ligularia formosana include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, and it is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules for medicinal use.
